title: Submitting a Grievance, Complaint, or HR Concern
text:
Q: How do I submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern?
A: To submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern, please follow these steps: First, document your concern in writing, including specific details such as dates, times, and individuals involved. Next, submit your written grievance to your direct supervisor or the HR department within 10 business days of the incident. If your concern involves your supervisor, you may submit it directly to HR. HR will acknowledge receipt of your grievance within 5 business days and will initiate an investigation. You can expect a resolution or update within 30 days. If you feel uncomfortable discussing the issue directly, you may also use the anonymous reporting tool available on the company intranet. For further assistance, contact the HR department at hr@company.com or call extension 1234.
